user.title: Configura BackupCheckup
user.description: Choose a ready-to-use monitoring profile. You can change it later in the integration options.

data_description.monitoring_profile: Standard is simple and suitable for most installations. Secure expects a second storage location. Custom shows all settings.

advanced.title: Custom monitoring settings
advanced.description: Set your own limits. Automatic size checking compares the newest backup with recent backups.

data.minimum_backup_size_mb: Fixed minimum backup size in MB
data.maximum_size_drop_percent: Maximum allowed size drop in percent

data_description.max_age_days: A warning is shown after this many complete days.
data_description.update_interval_minutes: How often BackupCheckup reads the Home Assistant backup inventory.
data_description.size_check_mode: Automatic is recommended for users who do not know their normal backup size.
data_description.minimum_backup_size_mb: Only used with the fixed minimum size mode.
data_description.maximum_size_drop_percent: Used for automatic comparison with previous backups.
data_description.minimum_redundant_locations: Use 1 for one storage location or 2 for local storage plus NAS/cloud.

abort.single_instance_allowed: È consentita una sola istanza di BackupCheckup.
